title: Control and safety system maintenance training simulator
abstract: A method (100) of maintenance training simulation includes providing (101) an at least partially virtual reality trainee console (206a or 206b) having training software, a simulated control and safety system (360) of a plant represented as a data model of simulated hardware devices including a process controller (210c), and a mapping block (245) for interfacing the trainee console to the data model. The mapping block converts (102) an injected hardware fault involving a simulated hardware device to make a change to the data model which changes a current operating state of the simulated system. A response of the process controller is displayed (103) showing changes to the current operating state to the trainee. The mapping block converts (104) an action of the trainee to the changes to the operating state to generate a further change in the data model. A response of the process controller is displayed (105) showing the further changes in the operating state to the trainee.
claims:
Claims 1. A method (100) of maintenance training simulation, comprising: providing (101) an at least partially virtual reality trainee console having training failure scenario and visualization software, a simulated control and safety system of an industrial plant represented as a data model of simulated hardware devices including at least one process controller, and a mapping block (245) that implements mapping software (245a) for interfacing said trainee console (206a or 206b) to said data model; said mapping block converting (102) an injected hardware fault involving at least one of said simulated hardware devices to make a change to said data model which changes a current operating state of said simulated control and safety system (360); displaying (103) a response of said process controller to said changes to said current operating state in a first said at least partially virtual reality -based view in said trainee console to said trainee; said mapping block converting (104) an action of said trainee responsive to said changes to said current operating state to generate a further change in said data model which further changes said operating state of said simulated control and safety system, and displaying (105) a response of said process controller to said further changes in said operating state in a second at least partially virtual reality-based view in said trainee console to at least said trainee. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein said trainee console comprises a head- mounted display (HMD). 3. The method of claim 1, further comprising an at least partially virtual reality trainer console (213) having said training failure scenario and visualization software, wherein said trainer console provides said injected hardware fault. 4. The method of claim I, wherein said data model composes an Open Platform Communications unified architecture (OPC Li A) model. 5. The method of claim I, wherein said trainee console comprises a mobile computing device. 6. The method of claim 1 , wherein said simulated hardware devices comprise input/output modules and field instruments. 7. The method of claim I, wherein said simulated control and safety system is generated by modifying a commercially available process simulator including exposing internally maintained hardware fault flags. 8. A maintenance training simulation system (200), comprising: an at least partially virtual reality trainee console (206a or 206b) having training failure scenario and visualization software, said trainee console configured to act as a human machine interface (HMI) layer; 

 a simulated control and safely system (210) of an industrial plant system represented as a data model of simulated hardwai'e devices including at least one process controller, and a mapping block (245) that implements mapping software (245a) for interfacing said trainee console to said data model; a network (240) for communicably coupling together components in said MTS system including said trainee console and said simulated control and safety system 210; said mapping block (245) implementing mapping software (245a) for converting an injected hardware fault involving at least one of said simulated hardware devices to make a change to said data model which changes a current operating state of said simulated control and safety system; said trainee console displaying a response of said process controller to said changes to said current operating state in a first said at least partially virtual reality based view to said trainee; said mapping block for converting an action of said trainee responsive to said changes to said current operating state to generate a further change in said data model which further changes said operating state of said simulated control and safety system, and said trainee console displaying a response of said process controller to said further changes in said operating state in a second at least partially virtual reality-based view to at least said trainee. 9. The maintenance training simulation system of claim 8, wherein said trainee console comprises a head-mounted display (HMD). 10. The maintenance training simulation system of claim 8, further comprising an at least partially virtual reality trainer console (213) having said training failure scenario and visualization software, wherein said trainer console is configured for providing said injected hardware fault it. 11. The maintenance training simulation system of claim 8, wherein said data model comprises an Open Platform Communications unified architecture (OPC UA) model. 12. The maintenance training simulation system of claim 8, wherein said trainee console comprises a mobile computing device.
